basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Recruitment 2026: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani has released the official notification for Institute Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 35 years as on the date of interview. Age relaxation is allowed up to 5 years for SC/ST/PH/OBC/Women candidates.
age_limit.details: Not exceeding 35 years as on the date of interview. Age relaxation is allowed up to 5 years for SC/ST/PH/OBC/Women candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Chemistry (with at least 60% marks) Or M.Pharm. (with at least 60 % marks)
qualification.details: Institute Research Fellow: Post Graduate Degree in Chemistry (with at least 60% marks) Or M.Pharm. (with at least 60 % marks). Experience in Synthetic Organic Chemistry/Peptide Chemistry Related Project Work will be given preference. Preference will also be given to candidates qualified with National Eligibility Tests-CSIR-UGC NET including PhD only / PhD + lectureship (Assistant Professorship) in Chemical Sciences / GATE in Chemistry.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
